text: There is a certain clinical detachment in the first space, yet the safety equipment reminds me of the thin line between order and chaos. The starkness allows my thoughts to echo, amplifying my sense of solitude. Moving to the second scene, surrounded by vibrant colors and research displays, I feel invigorated—a mingling of curiosity and awe. The intersection of technology and inquiry here prompts me to consider the collaboration between human minds and machines, and I feel small but significant—part of an ever-evolving conversation.
